lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: The afternoon sun filtered through the oak leaves as Kisten flicked his tail and stared across the park lawn.

lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: A family had spread a checkered blanket near the fountain, and right in the center of it sat the most magnificent cake he had ever seen—three layers, white frosting, dotted with strawberries.

lines.speaker: Bitera
lines.text: Maddie, you could walk right past them—they’ll think you’re a stray.

lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: There was a long pause. Kisten watched Maddie’s gaze drift back toward the cake.
